subcodes.first_line: O gentle breeze of dawn! Carry thou the Book of thy Lord unto all lands, that hearts may be quickened by the showers of their Lord's mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نسیم الصبا اذهب بکتاب ربک الی الدیار لتخضر القلوب من امطار رحمه ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation
